SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut

Class SupernautContext.StackEntry

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.SupernautContext.StackEntry
Enclosing class:
SupernautContext
public class SupernautContext.StackEntry extends Object
Represents a stack entry in the Supernaut context. It contains information about the program, communication area, channels, and handle conditions.

  • Method Details

    • getHandleConditions

      public Hashtable<Dfhresp,HandleCondition> getHandleConditions()
      Returns the current handle conditions.
      Returns:
      a hashtable containing the handle conditions

    • getHandleAids

      public Hashtable<Dfhaid,HandleCondition> getHandleAids()
      Returns the current handle AIDs.
      Returns:
      a hashtable containing the handle AIDs

    • pushHandle

      public void pushHandle()
      Pushes a new handle onto the stack.

    • popHandle

      public boolean popHandle()
      Pops the last handle from the stack.
      Returns:
      true if a handle was popped, false if there was only one handle left

    • getProgram

      public AbstractProgram getProgram()
      Returns the current program associated with this stack entry.
      Returns:
      the current program

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the program associated with this stack entry.
      Returns:
      the name of the program

    • getCommarea

      public AbstractNField getCommarea()
      Returns the communication area associated with this stack entry.
      Returns:
      the communication area

    • getCalen

      public int getCalen()
      Returns the length of the communication area.
      Returns:
      the length of the communication area

    • addChannel

      public void addChannel(Channel value)
      Adds a channel to the stack entry.
      Parameters:
      value - the channel to add

    • getChannel

      public Channel getChannel(String key)
      Returns the channel associated with the given key.
      Parameters:
      key - the key of the channel
      Returns:
      the channel if found, null otherwise

    • getAssignedChannel

      public Channel getAssignedChannel()
      Returns the assigned channel for this stack entry.
      Returns:
      the assigned channel

    • getHandleAbendLabelId

      public int getHandleAbendLabelId()
      Gets the ID of the label to handle abend.
      Returns:
      the handle abend label ID, or null if not set

    • setHandleAbendLabelId

      public void setHandleAbendLabelId(Integer handleAbendLabelId)
      Sets the ID of the label to handle abend.
      Parameters:
      handleAbendLabelId - the handle abend label ID to set

    • hasHandleAbendLabel

      public boolean hasHandleAbendLabel()
      Checks if there is a handle abend label set.
      Returns:
      true if a handle abend label ID is set, false otherwise
